title: WEFT Project — Stash2Go Profile
description: Stash2Go profile of Project. Extends the base Project schema with Ravelry sync, PDF linking, and migration tracking.

stash2go.description: Stash2Go-specific fields that extend the generic WEFT Project.

migration_status.description: Whether this project originated in Stash2Go or was imported from Ravelry.

ravelry_project_id.description: Original Ravelry project numeric ID (for API calls and sync).

ravelry_updated_at.description: Last known Ravelry update timestamp (for sync conflict resolution).

pdf_ids.description: Private PDF IDs linked to this project (Stash2Go PDF reader).

tool_ids.description: Stash2Go tool entity IDs assigned to this project.

device_id.description: Device that created this entry (for cross-device sync).

ravelry_pattern_id.description: Ravelry pattern ID linked to this project (if any).

smart_reader_enabled.description: Whether the smart pattern reader is active for this project's PDF.

knitting_mode.description: Smart reader feature level enabled for this project.
